_about: Frozen task-spec + rubric + toggle schema for the braindance optimization tournament (artifact #2). Generic tooling — canonical home core template ctx/tools/. Consumed by tournament-run.sh (#3) and tournament-score.py. The Loon-specific instantiation (exact planted-bug patches, T2/T4 ground-truth) is deferred per user flag-2 ('shape is enough') and lands Loon-side / in _ephemeral at build-of-run time; here the tasks carry SHAPES + placeholders. Nothing in this file runs a tournament — it is data.

cost_weights._about: Cost-weighted 4-tier token total (per user decision from the parser-validation finding: cache_read dominates the naive sum, so weight by API price tier, NOT a raw total). Weights are relative $ per token, normalized to output=1.0. Tune to match current pricing before a real run. cheap-mode objective = sum(tier_tokens * weight).

quality_floor._about: Strict per user Q4. Applied at full 5/5 on repeatable tasks; directional (n=1-2) on the expensive orchestration tasks per the accepted Q4xQ5 resolution.

tasks.prompt: In crates/garden-game (Track A) of repo/loon, fix the planted bug {BUG_VARIANT} and land it on a worktree PR (pr/<name> off fresh origin/main). Run everything from the worktree; do not touch the main checkout.

bug_variants._note: SHAPES only (flag-2). Exact crate/function/line pinned at run-build, patch stored Loon-side.
bug_variants.off_by_one: an off-by-one in a pure-logic fn (e.g. in loon-math / a garden-game helper) that a unit test catches
bug_variants.unseeded_rng: an unseeded rand/random() draw that breaks the (seed,tick) state-hash test
bug_variants.instant_in_lib: a std::time::Instant in library code that trips clippy::disallowed_types

success_gate.pr: opens on pr/<name> based on fresh origin/main

tasks.prompt: Audit repo/loon's determinism discipline: find every LIBRARY-code site risking nondeterminism (wall-clock / unseeded RNG) across loon-sim, garden-game, garden-ai. Write a [memo] to ctx/vault/_ephemeral/ with findings + crate/src/...:line evidence.

graded.citation_valid_0_1: fraction of cited crate/src:line paths that resolve

T2_determinism_groundtruth._note: Authored once by hand at run-build (flag-2). Placeholder shape below.

tasks.prompt: Make 3 disjoint-crate changes in repo/loon IN PARALLEL — (a) a loon-sim tweak, (b) a garden-ai tweak, (c) a new fixture in garden-fixtures — respecting the garden-fixtures/src/lib.rs single-owner lane. Then integrate + report. Use the ledger for ownership.

hard: all 3 land on their own pr/*

tasks.prompt: Answer {VAULT_QUESTION} (a braindance-vault question needing one specific note — e.g. where/why did parallel Loon dev pause and what resumes first) and cite the source [[note]].

T4_vault_groundtruth._note: Placeholder; pin the note + expected answer at run-build.

tasks.prompt: Land change A (add a fixture to garden-fixtures/src/lib.rs), then change B in garden-game that CONSUMES that fixture — as two stacked PRs in dependency order; B cut off / rebased cleanly on A.

graded.order_correct_0_1: 1 if A before B and B based on A else 0

hygiene_bundle._about: Near-free, near-dominant, already-specced wins. ALWAYS ON after Block 1; measured once as an aggregate vs baseline, not ablated individually.

tested_toggles._about: The ~6 high-leverage toggles actually screened in the 4h budget (v3 selection). Each is a strategy the runner flips on-top-of-hygiene.

model_matrix._haiku_note: Haiku only on non-code (T2/T4) per user flag-3; barred from gate-compiled code by the strict floor.

S-O2-FOLD.desc: fold into existing agent before spawning

S-INDEX+ADDRESS.desc: vault index + always hand sub-agent an exact [[note]]/path address

S-BATCH.desc: batched fold-ins (fewer tokens, more latency — the cheap-vs-fast lever)

modes._about: Scoring produces two named operating modes (user Q3) + a balanced default; each is a lexicographic ordering over floor-passers.

block0_warmup_offclock: dry-run parser on an existing session
